flags.label: Central Wyoming College · Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central Wyoming College are 15% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.4k vs $40.7k).

flags.label: Casper College · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Casper College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Casper College · Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Casper College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.8k).

flags.label: University of Wyoming · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wyoming rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.3k → $7.8k).

flags.label: Western Wyoming Community College · Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Wyoming Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $10.5k).

flags.label: Western Wyoming Community College · In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Wyoming Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.2k).

flags.label: University of Wyoming · Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wyoming rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.8k → $24.2k).

flags.label: Western Wyoming Community College · 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Wyoming Community College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (38.5% → 32.5%).
